title: Test 5
questions: What type of music do you enjoy listening to?
Do you prefer watching films at home or at the cinema? Why?
What is something you are proud of?
Do you think it is important to have hobbies?
What do you find difficult about learning English?
What would you like your life to be like in ten years?
helpScript: Something I am proud of is...
I think hobbies are important because...
The most difficult thing about English is...
In ten years, I would like to...
